g.text: Follow the map to the great old oak.
Follow the map to the garden shed.
Follow the map down to the stream.
Search around the roots of the oak.
Take the trail to the hollow log.
Take the trail to the tire swing.
Follow the map through the log.
Step into the shady green hollow.
Tiptoe up to the ring of pebbles.
Kneel down by the toad king.
Look at the ribbons on the swing.
Walk along the smooth low limb.
Sneak up to the garden shed.
Head to the big rock pile.
Follow the light to the corner.
Look at the stack of crates.
Look at the low flat stone.
Head down to the little stream.
Follow the line into the brambles.
Follow the meow into the bushes.
Hold the thorns aside and go in.
Say hello to the fluffy cat.
Give the cat a belly rub.
Hop across to the far bank.
